title: Selectweaks
description: Tweaks to the block selection box.
body:
**Selectweaks** is a clientside mod that allows you to change the color of the block selection box, with several options to do so. Additionally, the box reacts when you have low health, or low food, or when you take damage, just in case you're hurt while building in survival mode. Snap out of it—there's a zombie eating you.

---

**Selectweaks Options** include the ability to make the selection box a solid color of your choice, a solid color that strobes, or a rainbow outline. You can use the config file to select your preferred defaults. You can even switch back to the Minecraft default outline (black) by using an effect hotkey introduced by the mod. If you choose to play with the strobe or rainbow effect, you can also change strobe or color-cycling speed with a hotkey. This mod even respects the high contrast block outline option in the accessibility settings menu. Lastly, if you'd like to make the selection box invisible, you can do that too.
```
By default, the new hotkeys are [`] and [shift-`], but they can be changed in the keybinds menu.
```

![Selectweaks Colorized Selection Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i99GyFWG/images/d8694374be044bc907019745db161fa621c663dc.png)

To leave **Feedback** or a **Bug Report**, click "Report Issues" on the right and then click "New Issue". You are also welcome to leave a comment or a suggestion, or ask a question.

**Permissions**
- Please do not upload this mod to other websites.
- Feel free to use this in modpacks, if they are shared on Modrinth.

Mod authoring is difficult and time-consuming. Please consider [donating](https://ko-fi.com/exxtralife), if you enjoy the mod.
